Off Calendar Oct-22-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES:
Atty. RONALD LEE, Esq. of the San Francisco City Attorney's Office (Tel: 415-554-3935) for plaintiff People of the State of California;
No other appearances stated for this matter.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA's Unopposed Motion For Entry Of Stipulated Final Judgment And Injunction.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed motion for entry of stipulated final judgment and injunction is granted.

Order signed. Stipulated Final Judgment and Injunction signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
